title: Perl Weekly Challenge - 022
task1_desc: Write a script to print first **10 Sexy Prime Pairs**. Sexy primes are prime numbers that differ from each other by 6. For example, the numbers 5 and 11 are both sexy primes, because **11 - 5 = 6**. The term **"sexy prime"** is a pun stemming from the Latin word for six: sex. For more information, please checkout wiki [page](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sexy_prime).
task1_body: Write a script to print first **10 Sexy Prime Pairs**. Sexy primes are prime numbers that differ from each other by 6. For example, the numbers 5 and 11 are both sexy primes, because **11 - 5 = 6**. The term **"sexy prime"** is a pun stemming from the Latin word for six: sex. For more information, please checkout wiki [page](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sexy_prime).
task2_desc: Write a script to implement **Lempel–Ziv–Welch (LZW)** compression algorithm. The script should have method to **encode/decode** algorithm. The wiki [page](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lempel%E2%80%93Ziv%E2%80%93Welch) explains the compression algorithm very nicely.
task2_body:
Write a script to implement **Lempel–Ziv–Welch (LZW)** compression algorithm. The script should have method to **encode/decode** algorithm. The wiki [page](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lempel%E2%80%93Ziv%E2%80%93Welch) explains the compression algorithm very nicely.

I must confess, it took me many years to get my head around the compression algorithm, I finally understood while doing research for the task. So thanks to **Perl Weekly Challenge**, I can proudly say that now I understand the compression algorithm. I hope you will enjoy this task as much as I did.
